posts.author: Strictly.bait (Jessica Banda)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Monday team, I having been using the platform for about a year now, specifically for marketing campaign planning purposes and I noticed some visual data limitations on multiple features that obstructs subitem progress information. A seamless Integration of the subitem summary of a ( label/status) directly to the (parent label/status) would solve my biggest pain point of collecting all the subitem information from each individual campaign. By integrating the summary to the parent would also solve the issue with the missing subitem representation in charts.
